summary: Iteration 41: Testing 3 features - 1) BUG FIX: Expired/Expiring articles visible to ALL users (backend verified), 2) NEW FEATURE: 'Meine Entwürfe' section on Dashboard, 3) UI ENHANCEMENT: Password eye toggle in UserManagement. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend stats.py correctly removes 'created_by' filter from expiring_articles and expired_articles queries (lines 67-100)
Backend stats.py correctly adds 'my_drafts' field returning user's own draft articles (lines 112-120)
Dashboard.jsx correctly implements 'Meine Entwürfe' section with data-testid='my-drafts-section' (lines 770-823)
UserManagement.jsx correctly implements password toggle with data-testid='toggle-new-user-password' and 'toggle-change-password' (lines 802-821, 900-919)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features verified working: 1) Backend /api/stats no longer filters expiring_articles and expired_articles by created_by - both admin and editor see same articles (verified via pytest), 2) 'Meine Entwürfe' section appears on Dashboard when user has drafts - admin has 1 draft (TEST_Multiple_Contact_Persons), clicking navigates to /edit URL, 3) Password eye toggle works in both 'Neuer Benutzer' and 'Passwort ändern' dialogs - toggles between type='password' and type='text'.

backend_stats_api.no_created_by_filter: PASS - Both admin and editor see same expiring/expired articles count

dashboard_meine_entwuerfe.draft_count_badge: PASS - Shows '1' badge for admin's drafts
dashboard_meine_entwuerfe.draft_article_card: PASS - Shows 'TEST_Multiple_Contact_Persons' with date and 'Entwurf' badge

user_management_password_toggle.new_user_toggle_works: PASS - Toggles between type='password' and type='text'
user_management_password_toggle.change_password_toggle_works: PASS - Toggles between type='password' and type='text'

notes: No expiring/expired articles currently in DB with expiry dates, so those sections don't appear on dashboard. The backend fix was verified via pytest - both admin and editor get same article counts (no created_by filter). Editor user has no drafts so 'Meine Entwürfe' section doesn't appear for them.
